headline: How The GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) Narrative Is Shifting With New MedTech Clears And Cautious Targets
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies’ blended fair value estimate has shifted only slightly, from about US$93.05 to US$93.47 per share, signaling a very small adjustment to where analysts see the stock’s price target landing. That kind of incremental move aligns with street research that combines optimism about MedTech fundamentals and new product clearances with some caution around sector volatility and policy risk. As you read on, you will see how these small target tweaks, plus the latest commentary...
